info.title: Advanced Cybersecurity Analytics Service (ACAS)
info.description: Advanced Cybersecurity Analytics Service (ACAS) for AI-based analysis with explainable intelligence of network events captured by the Montimage Monitoring Tools (MMT)

externalDocs.description: Find out more about Montimage open-source projects

tags.name: mmt
tags.description: Everything relates to manipulating the MMT Tool

tags.name: reports
tags.description: Access to reports which are the output of analysing a pcap file

externalDocs.description: More detail on the report format

tags.name: dpi
tags.description: Deep Packet Inspection for protocol analysis

tags.name: logs
tags.description: Access to the log of MMT Tools

tags.name: security
tags.description: API relates to security operations including rule-based detection, IP blocking, and NATS messaging

tags.description: API relates to the model and the building model process

tags.name: features
tags.description: API for feature extraction from PCAP files

get.summary: Get the status of MMT Tool
get.description: Get the status of MMT Tool. Optional hostId/sessionId target a remote edge session.

parameters.name: hostId
parameters.description: Edge host id; omit or 'local' for the ACAS machine.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Remote session id (returned when starting online on an edge).

get.description: Stop the analyzing process if there is any. Optional hostId/sessionId stop a remote edge session.

parameters.name: hostId
parameters.description: Edge host id; omit or 'local' for the ACAS machine.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Remote session id to stop.

post.description: Analysing a pcap file

requestBody.description: The name of the pcap file

post.description: Start analysing a dataset which includes a set of trace files

post.summary: Start monitor a network interface in real-time
post.description: Run mmt-probe (and/or mmt_security) on a NIC in real-time. Runs on the ACAS machine by default; pass a registered edge hostId to capture on that edge — ACAS pulls the output back. For remote edges, engine selects probe | security | both. Returns sessionId for remote sessions.

requestBody.description: Interface to monitor. Omit hostId (or use 'local') for the ACAS machine; pass a registered edge hostId to monitor a remote machine.

hostId.description: Registered edge host id; omit or 'local' for the ACAS machine.

engine.description: Remote edges only: which engine(s) to run. Default 'both'.

get.description: Return the mmt-probe configuration. Local (default) returns ACAS's config file; pass hostId to return the config the edge agent is currently using.

parameters.name: hostId
parameters.description: Edge host id; omit or 'local' for the ACAS machine.

200.description: Config returned ({ ok, hostId, path, config })

put.description: Replace the mmt-probe configuration. Local writes ACAS's config file (the previous one is backed up to *.bak); pass hostId to push it to that edge. Takes effect on the next monitoring session.

hostId.description: Edge host id; omit or 'local' for the ACAS machine.

get.description: List remote MMT edge hosts. Bearer tokens are never returned.

post.description: Register a remote MMT host. Provide an ssh block and set provision:true to register AND deploy in one call (SSH in, build the agent image, run the container, sync rules + probe config). The agent's bearer token is generated and stored internally and injected into the agent during provisioning over SSH — it is never returned to the caller.

insecureTLS.description: Skip TLS cert verification (self-signed cert / trusted LAN). Defaults to true when ssh is provided.

ssh.description: SSH credentials for automatic provisioning. Provide a privateKey (or keyPath) or a password.

keyPath.description: Path to a private key file on the ACAS host.

sudo.description: Prefix docker commands with sudo on the edge.

provision.description: If true (and ssh is given), register AND provision in this one call: SSH in, build the image, run the agent, seed rules.

200.description: Host registered. With provision:true also returns the provisioning summary; otherwise returns nextStep.

put.description: Patch mutable fields (name/host/port/tls/insecureTLS/ssh). Only provided fields change; passing ssh replaces the whole ssh block.

delete.description: Remove the host registration from ACAS. Does not tear down the agent container on the edge — use deprovision first if you want to stop it.

post.summary: Provision the agent on an edge over SSH
post.description: One-step deploy: SSHes into the host, ensures Docker, builds the mmt-agent image (MMT baked into a pinned Ubuntu 20.04 base), runs the container with the bearer token injected, verifies /health, and syncs ACAS's rules + mmt-probe config to the edge. Requires SSH credentials on the host record.

500.description: Provisioning failed (no SSH creds, SSH/build/run error)

post.summary: Tear down the agent container on an edge
post.description: Removes the mmt-agent container on the edge over SSH. Keeps the host registration.

get.description: Calls the agent's /health and caches reported tool versions.
List the network interfaces on the edge (via the agent), for choosing which one to monitor.

post.summary: Sync ACAS rules + probe config to an edge host
post.description: Re-sends the current ACAS rule XML set (the edge recompiles and uses it over the deb defaults) and the mmt-probe config (so the edge's feature CSVs match what the model expects). No image rebuild needed — the agent picks both up on the next session.

get.description: Get the status of the latest prediction process
Get list of available network interfaces for online prediction

post.summary: Offline prediction with automatic MMT analysis
post.description: Start offline prediction on a PCAP file. Server automatically handles MMT analysis.

modelId.description: ID of the trained model to use for prediction

pcapFile.description: Name of the uploaded PCAP file. Server handles MMT analysis automatically.

useQueue.description: Use job queue for non-blocking execution (default: true)

jobId.description: Job ID for polling status (when useQueue=true)

400.description: Missing required parameters or MMT analysis failed

500.description: Internal server error or MMT timeout

get.description: Get the status of a queued prediction job

parameters.name: jobId
parameters.description: Job ID

post.summary: Start integrated online prediction with MMT-probe
post.description: Start real-time AI-based intrusion detection on a network interface (MMT-probe capture + feature extraction + AI prediction). Runs on the ACAS machine by default; pass hostId of a registered edge to capture features on that edge — ACAS pulls the feature CSVs and runs the model centrally.

modelId.description: Model ID to use for prediction

interface.description: Network interface to monitor (on the ACAS machine, or on the edge if hostId is set)

hostId.description: Registered edge host id; omit or 'local' for the ACAS machine.

get.description: Get the current status of online prediction

post.description: Stop a running online prediction. Pass sessionId (returned by /predict/online) to stop one specific session; omit it to stop all online predictions. For a single session, omitting it stops that one.

sessionId.description: Capture session id to stop (from /predict/online). Omit to stop all.

get.description: Get the status of rule-based detection (mmt-security)
List the mmt-security rule catalog (predefined + user-added). Each rule reports whether its XML source is available and whether it was added by a user.

parameters.name: refresh
parameters.description: If true, re-read the catalog from mmt_security instead of returning the cached list.

post.description: Create a new user rule. The XML is compiled and validated before being saved; the filename's numeric id prefix must match the rule's property_id, and the id must not collide with an existing rule.

xml.description: Raw mmt-security rule XML (must contain property_id matching the filename id).

200.description: Rule added; returns the refreshed catalog

400.description: Missing/invalid fields, id mismatch, id collision, or compile error

put.description: Replace the XML of a user-added rule (the id is fixed). Predefined rules cannot be edited. The change is rolled back if the new XML fails to compile.

xml.description: Raw mmt-security rule XML; property_id must equal the path id.

200.description: Rule updated; returns the refreshed catalog

400.description: Missing xml, not a user-added rule, id mismatch, or compile error

delete.description: Remove a user-added rule (its XML and compiled .so). Predefined rules cannot be removed.

200.description: Rule removed; returns the refreshed catalog

get.description: Return the raw XML source of a single rule by id.

404.description: No XML source for this rule

get.description: Get security alerts from rule-based detection. Pass the sessionId returned by /online/start (works for both local and remote-edge sessions; remote alerts are pulled from the edge into the session's report dir).

post.description: Start real-time rule-based intrusion detection. Runs on the ACAS machine by default; pass hostId of a registered edge to run mmt_security on that edge (ACAS pulls the alerts back). The returned sessionId is then used with /security/rule-based/alerts and /stop.

interface.description: Network interface to monitor (on the ACAS machine, or on the edge if hostId is set).

hostId.description: Registered edge host id; omit or 'local' for the ACAS machine.

200.description: Successfully started (returns sessionId; remote sessions also return hostId)

post.description: Stop real-time rule-based intrusion detection. For a remote edge session, pass hostId and sessionId.

hostId.description: Edge host id; omit for a local session.

post.description: Analyze PCAP file with rule-based detection
Extract network features from PCAP file
